- **L3 — UC10 §§5.3-5.4 lower-Walsh-vanishing + top-Walsh-concentration** (depends on L1+L2). Lean of: twisted-symmetric bridge, iterated antisymmetric bridge, V_S^k = 0 for S⊊[n], k≥1, V_[n]^k = 0 for 1≤k<n-1; UC14 R2/R3 tightenings.
- **L4 — UC11 Čech-sheaf framework** (depends on L1+L2+L3 = UC10.1 unconditional). Lean of: minimal counterexample F^*, trace cover U={U_x}, F_obs, mismatch cochain m_xy, obstruction class ob(F^*), Lemma 6.2 non-vanishing via witness-extension.
- **L5 — UC13/UC14 corrected landing + closing contradiction** (depends on L4). Lean of: Čech-bicomplex isotype-preservation via Schur for (Z/2)^n, ob(F^*) ∈ ⊕_x V_{x}^{n-1} (corrected from V_[n]^{n-1}), UC14 R1 abutment-identification chain map Θ, closing Frankl theorem.

## Trajectory

- **Frankl-side:** OPERATIONALLY COMPLETE. UC10+UC12+UC11+UC13+UC14 chain delivers the Frankl-closure contradiction unconditionally via Daniel's verbatim 5-step program. Lean-formalization push starts now (mg-d57e in flight). Three named technical residuals (R1/R2/R3) all tightened in UC14; no remaining math gaps in the paper-and-pencil chain.
- **1/3-2/3 side:** WALLED at F31 RED-chain-locality. The five routes walled at milestone-1 part (iii) include all the cohomology-side mechanisms: F28 (sheaf cohomology on POSET), F29 (Čech-bias scoping), F30 (chain-level Phi via cup-product), F31 (Phi_* injectivity fails by chain-locality). The dialect-check work on the Frankl-side (UC13 §3) confirms structurally that this is a *real* asymmetry — the (Z/2)^n-Walsh vs S_n-Specht distinction is the root cause; the Frankl-side mechanism cannot transfer to the 1/3-2/3 side.
- **Lean side:** No code yet. Awaiting mg-d57e scoping GREEN, then L1–L5 sub-tickets file.
- **Bottleneck:** None active. mg-d57e scoping is the critical path; everything else queues behind it.
